'''fathuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:raboday|raboday]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:raboday|raboday]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fathuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæthikith|fæthikith]] || [[word:fæthikij|fæthikij]] || [[word:fæthikish|fæthikish]] || [[word:fæthiki|fæthiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fathuthukuth|fathuthukuth]] || [[word:fathuthukuj|fathuthukuj]] || [[word:fathuthukush|fathuthukush]] || [[word:fathuthuku|fathuthuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fathukuth|fathukuth]] || [[word:fathukuj|fathukuj]] || [[word:fathukush|fathukush]] || [[word:fathuku|fathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fathufkuth|fathufkuth]] || [[word:fathufkuj|fathufkuj]] || [[word:fathufkush|fathufkush]] || [[word:fathufkuf|fathufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fathukuthu|fathukuthu]] || [[word:fathukuju|fathukuju]] || [[word:fathukushu|fathukushu]] || [[word:fathukuku|fathukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fathukuth|fathukuth]] || [[word:fathukuj|fathukuj]] || [[word:fathukush|fathukush]] || [[word:fathuku|fathuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fathukuthul|fathukuthul]] || [[word:fathukujul|fathukujul]] || [[word:fathukushul|fathukushul]] || [[word:fathukukul|fathukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fathukuthuthu|fathukuthuthu]] || [[word:fathukujuju|fathukujuju]] || [[word:fathukushushu|fathukushushu]] || [[word:fathukuku|fathukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fathukuthun|fathukuthun]] || [[word:fathukujun|fathukujun]] || [[word:fathukushun|fathukushun]] || [[word:fathukukun|fathukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fathukuthuoro|fathukuthuoro]] || [[word:fathukujuoro|fathukujuoro]] || [[word:fathukushuoro|fathukushuoro]] || [[word:fathukukuoro|fathukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
